use_cases: Indicating current page position in image galleries with smooth morphing transitions between states
Showing progress through onboarding flows with animated dot indicators
Providing pagination controls for product carousels and sliders
Navigating between slides in presentation-style interfaces
Indicating active sections in documentation or long-form content
ai_summary: Interactive page dot navigation component with smooth morphing animations when transitioning between active states. Provides visual feedback for multi-step processes, carousel pagination, and slide-based navigation with fluid state transitions.
